title: Droid's Create Sturcture
description: A mod that adds custom structures with Create component into the world!
body:
Welcome to Droid's Create Structure!

This mod adds new and interesting structures into your world that is based around the Create Mod. 

**There is currently a known issue that could corrupt/crash world when structure is first generated/loaded, please do NOT put this mod in worlds you treasure**

Current Structures:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Gold Mine

</details>



This mod is only needed on server side, optional to clients.

_This mod is still in early development, more structures are planned. Please ensure to backup regularly in case of error in mod_
